entries.title: Session 2026-02-17 15:03

entries.summary: Две задачи в одной сессии: **Task 1** — Расширение CTX по 4 направлениям: кросс-провайдерный запуск (Codex + Gemini), агенты со скилами (7 superpowers protocols), гибкий consilium (пресеты + выбор провайдеров/агентов). 17 новых файлов, 1...

entries.title: Session 2026-02-18 06:44
entries.summary: Session started. Command schema fixed. Ready for task definition.

entries.title: Session 2026-02-19 07:47
entries.goals: Завершить Day 6: SQLite слой (schema + adapter) после Day 5 Hot Reload
entries.summary: Day 6 завершен: введен storage adapter boundary, добавлен SQLite schema/bootstrap слой и сохранен безопасный fallback на JSON. Изменения покрыты тестами (`npm test`: 10/10 pass). Pipeline переведен в `done` с execution summary и логами.

entries.title: Session 2026-02-19 08:38
entries.goals: Day 8 - switch read path to SQLite with JSON backup fallback
entries.summary: Day 8 completed. Read path now supports controlled cutover to SQLite while retaining JSON backup fallback. Tests passed (`node --test`: 19 passed, 0 failed).

entries.title: Session 2026-02-19 09:07
entries.goals: Day 9 - cutover на SQLite primary с rollback и monitoring
entries.summary: Day 9 completed. Added SQLite-primary runtime failover to JSON backup with rollback/recovery telemetry and test coverage. Test suite passed (`node --test`: 24 passed, 0 failed).

entries.title: Session 2026-02-19 10:07
entries.goals: Day 10 - observability for SQLite primary, alerts, rollback runbook
entries.summary: Day 10 completed. Added operational observability for SQLite primary failover, warning thresholds, dashboard and API health exposure, and a rollback runbook. Test suite passed (`node --test`: 33 passed, 0 failed).

entries.title: Session 2026-02-19 11:39
entries.goals: Day 11 - auto rollback policy for SQLite primary
entries.summary: Day 11 completed. SQLite primary now has health-gated auto rollback with probe-based recovery and env overrides. Storage health exposes policy state for monitoring. Day 11-focused tests pass; one unrelated shell-utils test remains failin...

entries.title: Session 2026-03-03 09:41
